commands.review_summary:
The PR updates QQBot framework-command comments and unit coverage so private-only authenticated commands remain registered with `c2cOnly` metadata for bridge enforcement.

Reproducibility: yes. by source inspection: current main registers private auth-gated QQBot commands with `c2cOnly` metadata, then rejects non-explicit `qqbot:c2c:<id>` framework invocations before handlers run. I did not run tests because this was a read-only review.
commands.review_followup: Protected label plus stale PR wording make this a maintainer decision rather than a ClawSweeper cleanup or repair job.
